title: Unk's unifies
description: Unifies compatible with Nastia's miracle stones
body:
# This mods adds Unifications to Nastia's Miracle Stones mod

With this mod you will be able to unify your favourite miraculouses.

## Important!
To play with this mod you will need to have This mods installed: Nastia's Miracle Stones mod,Geckolib API, Curios API, Kleider`s Custom Renderer API


## How it works
Put on your miraculouses in the correct curios slot (for example ladybug and bee) Then press the unification keybind (By default N) And you will transfrom in that unification! To turn back to normal just press the divide keybing (By default B) And you will transfrom back to normal. You can also unify 2 miraculouses when you are transformed with one of the 2.

## Current Features
- Dual metamorphosis (Allows you to transform directly into that unification)
- Transformed Name (appears when you are transformed and replaces your name in chat)
- Suit preferences 
- Detransfroming phrase preferences (Default, Evil and good)

### Current Unifications
- Ladybug x Bee ( 7 suit preferences)
- Ladybug x Turtle ( 7 suit preferences)
- Ladybug x Fox( 7 suit preferences)
- Butterfly x Bee( 8 suit preferences)

### Credits:
- Suits: KoliksBro (Most of them) and TheHunter (Ladyfox, Ladyfox S6, Shady Rouge S6, Mister Fox S6, Scarlevex, Scarletrot)
